requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 as International Baseline for Zimbabwe BESS Project Acceptance via SAZ
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619作为津巴布韦BESS项目验收的国际基准（通过SAZ）
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619作為辛巴威BESS項目驗收的國際基準（通過SAZ）

summary.en: Zimbabwe does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation or Saudi Arabia's SABER/IEC 62619 route. The Standards Association of Zimbabwe (SAZ), established under the Standards Act (Chapter 25:08), is the national standards body responsible for adopting and publishing standards in Zimbabwe. SAZ adopts IEC standards, and IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules. SAZ conformity assessment recognises IEC certification evidence from ILAC-accredited laboratories as the applicable pathway; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as substitutes in Zimbabwe project specifications or SAZ conformity assessment. Zimbabwe project owners (utility-scale, C&I, and mining captive), ZERA licensing reviews, and ZETDC connection agreement requirements are expected to reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical prerequisite. Exporters should verify the current SAZ regulated-product scope and any mandatory pre-shipment conformity assessment obligations directly with SAZ before shipment.
summary.zh: 津巴布韦目前尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与欧盟《电池法规》或沙特阿拉伯SABER/IEC 62619路径相当。津巴布韦标准协会（SAZ）依据《标准法》（第25:08章）设立，是负责在津巴布韦采纳和发布标准的国家标准机构。SAZ采纳IEC标准，IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准。SAZ合格评定以ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC认证证据作为适用路径；中国GB/T标准不被津巴布韦项目规格或SAZ合格评定接受为替代依据。津巴布韦项目业主（公用事业规模、工商业和矿业自备）、ZERA许可审查及ZETDC并网协议要求预计将以IEC 62619合规作为技术前提。出口商在出货前应直接向SAZ核实现行SAZ受监管产品范围及任何强制装运前合格评定义务。
summary.zht: 辛巴威目前尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與歐盟《電池法規》或沙特阿拉伯SABER/IEC 62619路徑相當。辛巴威標準協會（SAZ）依據《標準法》（第25:08章）設立，是負責在辛巴威採納和發布標準的國家標準機構。SAZ採納IEC標準，IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準。SAZ合格評定以ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC認證證據作為適用路徑；中國GB/T標準不被辛巴威項目規格或SAZ合格評定接受為替代依據。辛巴威項目業主（公用事業規模、工商業和礦業自備）、ZERA許可審查及ZETDC併網協議要求預計將以IEC 62619合規作為技術前提。出口商在出貨前應直接向SAZ核實現行SAZ受監管產品範圍及任何強制裝運前合格評定義務。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Zimbabwe project specifications; adopted via SAZ)
IEC 62133 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries (additional cell safety reference for smaller format batteries)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety standard referenced in project specifications)
IEC 62040-3 — Uninterruptible Power Systems — Method of Specifying the Performance and Test Requirements (UPS/storage systems reference)
SAZ (Standards Association of Zimbabwe) — national standards body adopting IEC standards; conformity assessment authority; verify current regulated-product scope directly with SAZ (saz.org.zw)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters. GB/T 34120-2023 covers system connection to distribution networks. GB/T 31485-2015 provides an earlier battery safety reference. These Chinese standards are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as equivalents in Zimbabwe project specifications or SAZ conformity assessment. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance, and confirm IEC 62133 coverage for any applicable cell formats.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。GB/T 34120-2023覆盖系统接入配电网。GB/T 31485-2015提供早期电池安全参考。上述中国标准未与IEC 62619协调，不被津巴布韦项目规格或SAZ合格评定接受为等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书，并确认适用电芯规格的IEC 62133覆盖情况。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。GB/T 34120-2023覆蓋系統接入配電網。GB/T 31485-2015提供早期電池安全參考。上述中國標準未與IEC 62619協調，不被辛巴威項目規格或SAZ合格評定接受為等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書，並確認適用電芯規格的IEC 62133覆蓋情況。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
GB/T 31485-2015 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求及试验方法 (Safety Requirements and Test Methods for Traction Battery of Electric Vehicle)

gap.en: Critical gap: Zimbabwe project owners, ZERA licensing reviews, and ZETDC connection agreements reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. SAZ, as the national standards body, adopts IEC standards and recognises IEC certification from ILAC-accredited laboratories. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in Zimbabwe project technical specifications or SAZ conformity assessment. Exporters should: (a) verify the current SAZ regulated-product scope for any mandatory pre-shipment conformity assessment obligation — engage SAZ directly (saz.org.zw); (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Zimbabwe BESS projects; (c) confirm whether IEC 62133 coverage is additionally required for the specific cell format being supplied; (d) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification, ZERA licence condition, or ZETDC connection agreement before committing to a test programme.
gap.zh: 关键差距：津巴布韦项目业主、ZERA许可审查和ZETDC并网协议将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。SAZ作为国家标准机构，采纳IEC标准并认可ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC认证。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被津巴布韦项目技术规格或SAZ合格评定接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）核实SAZ现行受监管产品范围，确认是否存在强制装运前合格评定义务——直接联系SAZ（saz.org.zw）；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至津巴布韦BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）确认所供应特定电芯规格是否还须IEC 62133覆盖；（d）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格、ZERA许可条件或ZETDC并网协议中引用的IEC 62619版本。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：辛巴威項目業主、ZERA許可審查和ZETDC併網協議將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。SAZ作為國家標準機構，採納IEC標準並認可ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC認證。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被辛巴威項目技術規格或SAZ合格評定接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）核實SAZ現行受監管產品範圍，確認是否存在強制裝運前合格評定義務——直接聯繫SAZ（saz.org.zw）；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至辛巴威BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）確認所供應特定電芯規格是否還須IEC 62133覆蓋；（d）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格、ZERA許可條件或ZETDC併網協議中引用的IEC 62619版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where ZERA, ZETDC, or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; SAZ mandatory regulatory obligation for BESS has not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with SAZ (saz.org.zw)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Zimbabwe as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Zimbabwe project specifications and ZERA/ZETDC requirements, recognised by SAZ as an adopted IEC standard. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Zimbabwe project acceptance. Verify SAZ current regulated-product scope and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with SAZ, the project owner, and ZERA before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，津巴布韦尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是津巴布韦项目规格和ZERA/ZETDC要求中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准，被SAZ认可为已采纳的IEC标准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足津巴布韦项目验收要求。出货前请向SAZ核实现行受监管产品范围，并向SAZ、项目业主和ZERA确认IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，辛巴威尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是辛巴威項目規格和ZERA/ZETDC要求中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準，被SAZ認可為已採納的IEC標準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足辛巴威項目驗收要求。出貨前請向SAZ核實現行受監管產品範圍，並向SAZ、項目業主和ZERA確認IEC 62619證據要求。
